page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project Official Strategy Book
text:
is a guidebook for the video game Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project by Login Editorial Department. It was published by Enterbrain on 01 November 2001. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4757706669 

Overview

A strategy book for the Ayanami Raising Project game. In addition to the strategy guide, original drawings are included. The appendix CD-ROM contains the original additional data and the demo and wallpaper.
